overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 exploring a futuristic rooftop bar at night. The player walks through neon-lit interior spaces, exits to a wet terrace with panoramic city views, circles around the bar area with red accent lighting, and approaches NPCs interacting at the counter.

leather bar stools lined up along the counter

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a modern rooftop bar with warm interior lighting. The camera moves along a wooden bar counter where a bartender in an orange shirt works behind illuminated bottle displays. The player approaches glass exit doors leading to an outdoor terrace with views of the city lights.

segments.scene_description: The player exits onto a spacious rooftop terrace with wet wooden decking and panoramic views of the illuminated city skyline. The area features outdoor seating with umbrellas and red neon accent lighting along the building exterior. After crossing the terrace, the player approaches glass doors to re-enter the bar.

turns right to approach the main bar counter area

NPC bartender wearing a blue shirt behind the counter

segments.scene_description: The player enters a secondary bar area characterized by dramatic red neon strip lighting along the walls and counter. A bartender in a blue shirt stands behind the counter as the player walks past leather bar stools and modern ceiling fixtures, turning toward the main bar area.

scene_state.functional_zone: main bar counter with interactive NPCs

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the main bar counter where a female NPC with distinctive short blonde hair stands using her smartphone. A bartender in a black vest leans over to interact with her. The bar features an elaborate backlit bottle display with blue and green lighting. A male NPC in sunglasses walks past as the player observes the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: bar exit corridor leading to terrace

events.description: exits building through glass doors back to outdoor terrace

agents.ego_description: turning away from the bar counter and walking toward the exit

segments.scene_description: The player turns away from the bar counter and walks toward the glass exit doors. The bar counter falls to the left as the player approaches the transition back to the outdoor terrace, with the city lights visible through the glass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic rooftop bar, transitioning from warm interior spaces to a rain-slicked terrace before returning to a neon-drenched lounge. It begins inside a modern bar, moving past a bartender in orange along a wooden counter toward glass exit doors. As the camera steps outside, the environment opens into a spacious rooftop terrace with wet decking and red neon accents set against a panoramic city skyline, before turning back through the glass doors into a secondary area defined by dramatic red strip lighting and leather stools. The scene then shifts toward the main bar counter, where a bartender in a black vest interacts with a blonde woman using a smartphone beneath a blue and green backlit bottle display. Finally, the camera pivots away from the counter and moves back toward the glass exits, leaving the interior glow behind as the city lights reappear through the windows.
